prompt: Create a modern comic-style close-up portrait of a glamorous young woman with black shoulder-length wavy hair, warm fair skin, glossy full lips, subtle winged eyeliner, and a calm confident gaze looking slightly toward the viewer. She is posed in a three-quarter view with one bare shoulder visible and one elegant hand resting under her chin, long manicured nails visible. Cover her face, neck, shoulder, arm, and hand with vivid projected light patterns: concentric contour-like rainbow ripples in neon cyan, magenta, purple, orange, green, and pale yellow, as if a psychedelic moiré or oil-slick topographic projection is cast across her skin and hair. Use the same swirling luminous pattern as the entire background, dense and high-contrast, with many organic oval rings and warped bands flowing diagonally around her silhouette. Style should be a polished modern manga / semi-realistic comic illustration with sharp ink-like linework, painterly shading, high detail in eyes, lips, hair strands, and hands, dramatic saturated lighting, deep shadows, glossy highlights, and a square canvas. No text, no watermark, no border, no extra characters.
promptEn: Create a modern comic-style close-up portrait of a glamorous young woman with black shoulder-length wavy hair, warm fair skin, glossy full lips, subtle winged eyeliner, and a calm confident gaze looking slightly toward the viewer. She is posed in a three-quarter view with one bare shoulder visible and one elegant hand resting under her chin, long manicured nails visible. Cover her face, neck, shoulder, arm, and hand with vivid projected light patterns: concentric contour-like rainbow ripples in neon cyan, magenta, purple, orange, green, and pale yellow, as if a psychedelic moiré or oil-slick topographic projection is cast across her skin and hair. Use the same swirling luminous pattern as the entire background, dense and high-contrast, with many organic oval rings and warped bands flowing diagonally around her silhouette. Style should be a polished modern manga / semi-realistic comic illustration with sharp ink-like linework, painterly shading, high detail in eyes, lips, hair strands, and hands, dramatic saturated lighting, deep shadows, glossy highlights, and a square canvas. No text, no watermark, no border, no extra characters.
promptZh: 创作一张现代漫画风格的特写肖像，主角是一位迷人的年轻女性，留着 黑色 的齐肩波浪发，拥有温暖白皙的皮肤、饱满水润的嘴唇、精致的猫眼眼线，神情冷静自信，目光略微看向观众。她以四分之三侧面姿势呈现，露出一侧肩膀，一只修长的手优雅地托在下巴下方，可见修剪整齐的长指甲。在她的脸部、颈部、肩膀、手臂和手上覆盖生动的投射光影图案：霓虹青色、洋红色、紫色、橙色、绿色和淡黄色的同心圆轮廓彩虹涟漪，仿佛迷幻的莫尔条纹或油膜地形投影投射在她的皮肤和头发上。背景使用与人物身上相同的漩涡状发光图案，密集且高对比度，许多有机的椭圆形环和扭曲的带状线条围绕着她的轮廓斜向流动。风格应为精致的现代漫画 / 半写实漫画插画，具有锐利的墨线感、绘画般的阴影、对眼睛、嘴唇、发丝和手部的高细节刻画、戏剧性的饱和光影、深邃的阴影、光泽的高光，采用正方形画布。无文字，无水印，无边框，无多余角色。
